## Verification

## Accessibility and responsive behavior

Describe keyboard, focus, names/live regions, reduced motion/forced colors, and tested widths. Attach screenshots for visible UI changes when useful.

## Security, privacy, safety, and cost

Describe trust boundaries, secret handling, provenance/rights, child or event implications, remote-resource behavior, and free-tier impact.
